content.situation: 你刚完成在线课程注册，想确认是否成功并获取电子凭证以便提交给学校
content.speakerText: I just signed up for the course. Can you tell me how I can confirm it was successful?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚注册了这门课程，你能告诉我怎么确认注册成功了吗？
content.responseTemplate: You'll receive a ___ with all the details, and it will also appear in your account dashboard.
content.hint: 通常系统会发送一封包含注册信息的邮件作为正式确认
content.knowledgePoint: 确认成功后的标准反馈方式

content.situation: 你需要为奖学金申请提供注册证明，想询问是否可以下载或打印官方凭证
content.speakerText: I need official proof of registration for my scholarship application. ___?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要官方的注册证明用于奖学金申请，我可以获取吗？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, you can download a ___ from the ‘My Courses’ section.
content.hint: 用于正式用途的凭证通常是官方出具的证书或证明文件
content.knowledgePoint: 索取正式凭证的表达方式

content.situation: 你担心注册信息未同步，想确认系统是否会同时更新多个平台
content.speakerText: Will my registration be updated in both the portal and my email? I want to make sure ___.
content.speakerTextCn: 我的注册信息会在门户和邮箱里都更新吗？我想确保万无一失。
content.responseTemplate: Yes, both systems are synced — you’ll see the status change online and get an email ___.
content.hint: 系统自动发送的确认信息通常称为 notification（通知）
content.knowledgePoint: 多渠道同步确认的常用表达
